fields.title: Clean Architecture
fields.author: Robert C. Martin
fields.description: A practical guide to software architecture principles, clean boundaries, and long-term maintainable systems.

fields.title: Designing Data-Intensive Applications
fields.author: Martin Kleppmann
fields.description: Deep dive into data systems: storage engines, stream processing, distributed consensus, and reliability trade-offs.

fields.title: Building Microservices
fields.author: Sam Newman
fields.description: Patterns and practices for decomposing systems into resilient, independently deployable services.

fields.title: Refactoring
fields.author: Martin Fowler
fields.description: Catalog of proven refactoring techniques to improve existing code without changing behavior.

fields.title: The Pragmatic Programmer
fields.author: Andrew Hunt
fields.description: Timeless engineering mindset and practical habits for becoming an effective software professional.
